title: Kāmārhāti Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kāmārhāti with a Z-Score of +4.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kāmārhāti is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 84%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed of 14.8 km/h is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
